LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-06-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DOC.AI INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST, SECOND, EIGHTH, AND NINTH CAUSES OF ACTION, SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOURTH AND SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION, AND SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-29-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2022 Off Calendar

Plaintiff S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena On Sorcero, Inc. For Production Of Employment Records And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And/Or Its Attorneys, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Nov-02-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM videoconference:
Adam Kmett, Esq., for the Plaintiff;
Greg Klingsporn, Esq., Tel. 650.324.9300, ext. 1100, for the Defendant.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter called. ARGUMENT is held.

At the conclusion of argument, PLAINTIFF KENNETH HAASE'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena On Sorcero, Inc. For Production Of Employment Records And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And/Or Its Attorneys is Denied. Mr. Klingsporn is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312. The proposed order must be e-mailed to the Judge Pro Tem at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: J. Alameda, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2021 Set For Trial On Feb-07-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2021 Continued To Apr-14-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DOC.AI INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrer to Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is overruled as to the first, second, eighth, and ninth causes of action, sustained with leave to amend as to the fourth and sixth causes of action, and sustained without leave to amend as to the third cause of action. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
